Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Respondent/Plaintiff Steve McDonald.
Appellant/Defendant Jan Sevcik.

The case comes on for hearing on trial de novo. Parties are sworn and each testifies on his own behalf. Plaintiff submits documentary evidence. Defendant submits three exhibits, which are not marked:

Two company checks
Invoice for $5,000
Document re corporate identity

The matter is taken under submission.
